meta.name: Operational_Risk_MAX
meta.description: MAX-density operational risk kernel integrating COSO, Basel, ISO 31000.

rules: RISK_RULE_1: All risks must be identified and catalogued.
RISK_RULE_2: Risk assessment requires quantitative and qualitative analysis.
RISK_RULE_3: Risk appetite must be defined organization-wide.

equations: Residual Risk = Inherent Risk - Control Effectiveness
invariants: INV_RISK_1: Total risk exposure must not exceed risk appetite.
INV_RISK_2: All material risks must have assigned owners.
